title: Notices of objection - Canada.ca
content:
## Notices of objection
(Some of the material originates with organizations not subject to the Official Languages Act and is only available in the language in which it was written.)
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to the proposed Prohibition of Certain Toxic Substances Regulations, 2022
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to the proposed order adding crude tall oil to Schedule 1 of the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA)
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to proposed Single-Use Plastics Prohibition Regulations
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to proposed order adding plastic manufactured items to Schedule 1 of the Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 (CEPA)
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to the proposed Prohibition of Asbestos and Asbestos Products Regulations
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to the proposed Microbeads in Toiletries Regulations
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to the renewal of disposal at sea permit No. 4543-2-03597, amended
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to disposal at sea permit No. 4543-2-03607
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to proposed order to add hexanedioic acid, bis(2-ethylhexyl) ester (DEHA) to the List of toxic substances in Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to proposed order to add N,N'-mixed phenyl and tolyl derivatives of 1,4-benzenediamine (CAS No. 68953-84-4; "BENPAT") to Schedule I of CEPA
- Notices of objection and request for board of review in relation to proposed Regulations Respecting Products Containing Certain Substances Listed in Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Notices of objection and request for board of review in relation to proposed order adding toxic substances (Vanadium pentoxide) to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Notices of objection and request for board of review in relation to the proposed Regulations Amending the Gasoline Regulations
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to the proposed order to add Phenol, 4,4' -(1-methylethylidene) bis- (bisphenol A) to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Notice of objection and request for board of review in relation to the proposed order to add Cyclotetrasiloxane, octamethyl- (D4) and Cyclopentasiloxane, decamethyl- (D5) to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Proposed order to add Propanedinitrile, [[4-[[2-(4-cyclohexylphenoxy)ethyl]ethylamino]-2-methylphenyl]methylene]- (CHPD) to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Proposed order adding toxic substances to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Proposed order to add chlorinated paraffins to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Regulations Amending the Gasoline Regulations (SOR/2008-126)
- Polybrominated Diphenyl Ethers Regulations of CEPA
- Order adding toxic substances to Schedule 1 of CEPA and Regulations Amending the Prohibition of Certain Toxic Substances Regulations, 2005 (four new fluorotelomer-based substances)
- Disposal at sea permit No. 4543-2-06369
- Proposed order to add the Kyoto greenhouse gases to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Proposed addition of hexachlorobutadiene to the virtual elimination list
- Proposed order to add road salts that contain inorganic chloride salts with or without ferrocyanide salts to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Proposed order respecting the addition of the Pest Control Products Act (PCPA) and the pest control products regulations (PCPR) to Schedule 2 of CEPA
- Proposed order to add respirable particulate matter less than or equal to 10 microns (PM 10 ) to Schedule 1 of CEPA
- Agreements respecting Canada-wide standards for benzene - phase I, for particulate matter (PM) and ozone, and for mercury
- Proposed order adding polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAHs) and fluorides to Schedule 1 of CEPA
